task_description: Fix three online multiplayer bugs: (1) TRAIN - monster card placement UI not triggering, (2) MARSHAL - moves sent immediately with no undo/buffer, (3) HARVEST - rewards should be sequential per-player with per-player coin popup

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation (npx tsc --noEmit) and Vite build (npx vite build) both pass. No test framework configured in the project.

review_fixes.summary: Fixed 3 issues from code review: (1) Added player-turn validation to MONSTER_PLACED handler matching BUY_CARD pattern, (2) Added player validation to SKIP_MARSHAL_TURN handler using marshalResolutionOrder, (3) Removed dead useEffect in HarvestPopup.tsx
